sentences.target: Wir sprechen über weiter- im Unterricht.

translations.de: Wir sprechen über weiter- im Unterricht.
translations.en: We talk about weiter- in class.
translations.fr: On parle de weiter- en cours.
translations.ru: На уроке мы говорим о weiter-.
translations.vi: Trong lớp, chúng tôi nói về weiter-.
translations.nl: We praten over weiter- in de les.
translations.uk: На уроці ми говоримо про weiter-.
translations.hu: Az órán a weiter- témáról beszélünk.
translations.hi: कक्षा में हम weiter- के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.el: Στο μάθημα μιλάμε για το weiter-.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om weiter- i timen.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om weiter- på lektionen.
translations.da: Vi taler om weiter- i timen.
translations.ja: 授業でweiter-について話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present indicative, 1st person plural; predicates the act of speaking.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the topic of conversation.
Separable verbal particle/prefix used metalinguistically; here the prepositional object of 'über'.
Fused preposition+article (in+dem); marks location (dative) for the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im', indicating the setting.

sentences.target: Du setzt weiter- vor das Verb.

translations.de: Du setzt weiter- vor das Verb.
translations.en: You put weiter- before the verb.
translations.fr: Tu mets weiter- avant le verbe.
translations.pt: Você coloca weiter- antes do verbo.
translations.he: אתה שם את weiter- לפני הפועל.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt weiter- trước động từ.
translations.nl: Je zet weiter- voor het werkwoord.
translations.hu: A weiter-t az ige elé teszed.
translations.hi: तुम क्रिया से पहले weiter- लगाते हो.
translations.el: Βάζεις το weiter- πριν από το ρήμα.
translations.id: Kamu menaruh weiter- sebelum kata kerja.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject.
Main verb, finite present indicative, 2nd person singular; denotes placing.
Separable verbal particle/prefix named as the item being placed; direct object of 'setzt'.
Preposition (here with accusative, directional); indicates position relative to the verb.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determines 'Verb'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Im Heft markiere ich weiter- rot.

translations.de: Im Heft markiere ich weiter- rot.
translations.en: In the notebook, I mark weiter- in red.
translations.es: En el cuaderno marco weiter- en rojo.
translations.fr: Dans le cahier, je surligne weiter- en rouge.
translations.it: Sul quaderno evidenzio weiter- in rosso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在本子里把weiter-用红色标出来。
translations.yue: 我喺筆記本用紅色標示weiter-。
translations.ru: В тетради я выделяю weiter- красным.
translations.pt: No caderno, eu destaco weiter- em vermelho.
translations.he: במחברת אני מסמן את weiter- באדום.
translations.vi: Trong vở, tôi đánh dấu weiter- bằng màu đỏ.
translations.ar: في الدفتر، أُبرز weiter- باللون الأحمر.
translations.nl: In het schrift markeer ik weiter- in het rood.
translations.uk: У зошиті я виділяю weiter- червоним.
translations.hu: A füzetben pirossal megjelölöm a weiter-t.
translations.hi: कापी में मैं weiter- को लाल रंग से चिन्हित करता हूँ.
translations.pl: W zeszycie zaznaczam weiter- na czerwono.
translations.el: Στο τετράδιο σημειώνω το weiter- με κόκκινο.
translations.nb: I kladdeboka markerer jeg weiter- i rødt.
translations.id: Di buku catatan, saya menandai weiter- dengan warna merah.
translations.sv: I häftet markerar jag weiter- med rött.
translations.ro: În caiet, evidențiez weiter- cu roșu.
translations.da: I hæftet markerer jeg weiter- med rødt.
translations.ja: ノートにweiter-を赤でマークします。

tokens.explanation: Fused preposition+article (in+dem); introduces a locative PP (dative).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'Im'.
Main verb, finite present indicative, 1st person singular; action performed by the speaker.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Separable verbal particle/prefix referred to metalinguistically; direct object of 'markiere'.
Adjective (color); predicative complement specifying how the object is marked.

sentences.target: Die Lehrerin erklärt weiter- am Beispiel.

translations.de: Die Lehrerin erklärt weiter- am Beispiel.
translations.en: The teacher explains weiter- with an example.
translations.es: La profesora explica weiter- con un ejemplo.
translations.fr: La professeure explique weiter- avec un exemple.
translations.it: L'insegnante spiega weiter- con un esempio.
translations.pt: A professora explica weiter- com um exemplo.
translations.he: המורה מסבירה את weiter- בעזרת דוגמה.
translations.vi: Cô giáo giải thích weiter- bằng một ví dụ.
translations.nl: De lerares legt weiter- uit met een voorbeeld.
translations.hu: A tanárnő példával magyarázza a weiter-t.
translations.hi: अध्यापिका उदाहरण से weiter- समझाती है.
translations.el: Η δασκάλα εξηγεί το weiter- με ένα παράδειγμα.
translations.nb: Læreren forklarer weiter- med et eksempel.
translations.sv: Läraren förklarar weiter- med ett exempel.
translations.ro: Profesoara explică weiter- cu un exemplu.
translations.da: Læreren forklarer weiter- med et eksempel.
translations.ja: 先生は例を使ってweiter-を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determines 'Lehrerin'.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses the act of explaining.
Separable verbal particle/prefix mentioned as the thing being explained; direct object of 'erklärt'.
Fused preposition+article (an+dem); introduces an instrumental/locative PP (dative).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'am', indicating the illustrative means.
